conversations.content:
I'll be arriving in London on March 15th. Last year, I stayed at the 'London Luxury Hotel', which had amazing reviews and ratings. It was super quiet and clean, and my room had a view of the Thames River. It was such a great experience! This time, I want to try out a new hotel. Once I figure out which one is the best, I'll head there and then find a good restaurant to eat at with my friends.
I have a budget of 160 for the hotel, and I want to stay in a hotel with the highest rating. Can you recommend a hotel? Tell me the name, rating, price range, and address. Thanks a bunch!

<function_thought>
To satisfy the user's request for a hotel in London with a budget of £160 and the best rating, I will begin by searching for all hotels in London. Once I have that list, I can find their price ranges and ratings to identify the best option that fits the user's criteria. The initial step will be to gather all hotels in London.
</function_thought>

<function_call>[get_all_hotels_in_city(city="London")]</function_call>

<final_answer></final_answer>

Hotel Names: Cozy Stay
Mom's Home
London Luxury
Covent Garden Retreat
Riverside View

<function_thought>
I have retrieved a list of hotels in London: "Cozy Stay," "Mom's Home," "London Luxury," "Covent Garden Retreat," and "Riverside View." The next step is to get the price range for these hotels, which will help in identifying one that fits within the user's budget of £160.
</function_thought>
